div.p: Tightly coupled: lock complex integration happens during dropins, requiring both crawled data and graph to be present.

ol.li: Tight coupling: dropins needs lock + bridge + sections + DISK all at once
No caching: changing lock logic requires re-running everything
Embedded bridge detection happens during dropins, not during lock/bridge
Lock complex grouping (group_complexes) does too much at once
Test data is ad-hoc, not structured by challenge type
